textByHash.7a2d026bf30c8de1df6b06162525c108de15cce4: I'm Toby, the taskmaster for the Varrock Achievement Diary.
textByHash.6a00bde6ede2fb950b475aa6f32708cdd096b1e7: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. In Varrock and the surrounding area it can help you discover some quite useful things. Eventually, with enough exploration, the inhabitants will
textByHash.ca64dc2762531723f270ebfeb7a0717ec1d4c1e6: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.
textByHash.35ee5919996041028c002655af19dd24d108afb2: Well, there are four different Varrock armours, which match up with the four levels of difficulty. Each has the same rewards as the previous level and some additional benefits too... which tier of rewards would you like to
textByHash.75f1e1f0bfb82994d2bf5968114a71deb0900a5a: If you complete all of the easy tasks in Varrock, you have a 10% chance of mining two ores at once up to coal and a 10% chance of smelting 2 bars at once up to steel, when using the Edgeville furnace. Zaff will
textByHash.acd9ea222d6573c836d75bc615d93f3329074d5a: In addition to the easy rewards, you have a 10% chance of mining two ores at once up to mithril and a 10% chance of smelting 2 bars at once up to mithril, when using the Edgeville furnace. Zaff will stock 30
textByHash.60297edee629ce44761a3e0d5425c884df533573: In addition to the easy and medium benefits, you have a 10% chance of mining two ores at once up to adamant and a 10% chance of smelting 2 bars at once up to adamant, when using the Edgeville furnace. Zaff
textByHash.13eecd042ce35ba5f3fed04679c54c975e0c298e: will stock 60 Battlestaves per day and you can access the bank at the Cooking guild.
textByHash.8386f4b39a5ad47b9c729c9ca38b60d7ae7532da: In addition to the previous tiers of rewards, you have a 10% chance of mining two ores at once up to runite and a 10% chance of smelting 2 bars at once up to runite, when using the Edgeville furnace. Zaff will stock
textByHash.09d29d4d2bb58b8df3ff3d5966de785bbbc37d20: 120 Battlestaves per day and the plate functions as a Prospector top.
textByHash.02f3d3c23d7f178c1be68b039aa07d18cd783c8b: Just complete the tasks in the Varrock area so they're ticked off, then come and speak to me for your rewards.
textByHash.8e099187a868e3b6eca57bf212d856fe987d09a6: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!
textByHash.6cac27e0d8e9827332ff0db56cf9ad1df5191ddb: You need at least two inventory spaces, make some space and come back.
textByHash.bd89f577b8d2ab40998785935773b98d73309493: This armour is a symbol of your exploration of Varrock. You now have a 10% chance of mining two ores at once up to coal and a 10% chance of smelting 2 bars at once up to steel, when using the Edgeville
textByHash.95d80acb2ffb6cfdf8e676815ef5054bd37882af: furnace. Zaff will stock 15 Battlestaves per day.
textByHash.7c6bb9beef855a143e8215b62616c299a47819d0: I've upgraded your Varrock armour for you. You now have a 10% chance of mining two ores at once up to mithril and a 10% chance of smelting 2 bars at once up to mithril, when using the Edgeville furnace. Zaff will
textByHash.2cbff462a40ccd07dcd52847ea532df27e8100f9: I've upgraded your Varrock armour for you. You now have a 10% chance of mining two ores at once up to adamant and a 10% chance of smelting 2 bars at once up to adamant, when using the Edgeville furnace. Zaff
textByHash.2c59bc4e88dda27317dcb3320c0f7774d0f839d7: will stock 60 Battlestaves per day and you can now access the bank at the Cooking guild.
textByHash.95d81b52887ddbc363b157d5c36493c549fd73f7: You need to complete all of the easy, medium and hard tasks too before I can reward you for the elite task set.
textByHash.cd376c034f5244ea6551797dca71340e437f67b3: I can see that, well done! You've completed all of the tasks in the Varrock area! Here's your reward!
textByHash.dc88583b0d0e2bfbeb75df0deb4791b6172935c8: I've upgraded your Varrock armour for you. You now have a 10% chance of mining two ores at once up to runite and a 10% chance of smelting 2 bars at once up to runite, when using the Edgeville furnace. Zaff will
textByHash.c2b227258677cea595470c62ee049df66c834f52: stock 120 Battlestaves per day and the plate functions as a Prospector top.
